docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-08-2023 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 624. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE, BY ADMISSION OF SERVICE AND COURT'S CURING OF UNTIMELINESS. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2023 BY SHARON M. REARDON. PLAINTIFF MYERS MONIGAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE ESTRELLA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SHARON M. REARDON; CLERK: D. AU/K. RAYALA. NOT REPORTED. (D624)
ORDER TO CONTINUE TO CURE UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE AND PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JPT

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONIGAN, MYSRS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESTRELLA, JOSE $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $575.00, $500 FOR PAIN & SUFFERING RELATING TO THE CAR SHUTTING DOWN, STORAGE FEES & HAVING TO WALK TO MEDICAL APPOINTMENTS. SEE ATTACHMENT MC-025 FORM FOR ADDITIONAL TEXT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MONIGAN, MYSRS AS TO DEFENDANT ESTRELLA, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-08-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MYERS MONIGAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE ESTRELLA IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT INFORMED THE COURT THAT HE RECEIVED A COPY OF THE COMPLAINT AT HIS PLACE OF WORK, BUT DOESN'T REMEMBER WHEN HE WAS SERVED; SERVICE MUST CURE FOR UNTIMELINESS. ***PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM.*** NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2023 - JUDGMENT.
